Implementing DevOps with Ihsan (Excellence)
HomeServicesCase StudiesAboutEngagementBook Call

Senior DevOps services with spiritual integrity

Engineer-to-engineer delivery. We explain trade-offs, document decisions, and build what we’d run ourselves.

CI/CD Automation

  • GitHub Actions / CodePipeline
  • Blue-Green / Canary
  • Quality gates
  • Automated rollbacks
  • Multi-env pipelines
Deliverables:
  • Pipeline as Code
  • Deployment playbooks
  • Rollback procedure
  • Observability hooks

Kubernetes & Containers

  • EKS/GKE/AKS
  • GitOps (ArgoCD)
  • Istio (optional)
  • Autoscaling
  • Secured networking
Deliverables:
  • Cluster baseline
  • GitOps repo
  • SRE runbook
  • Cost guardrails

Cloud Architecture & IaC

  • AWS/GCP/Azure
  • Terraform modules
  • ALB/NLB, Route 53/Cloudflare
  • SSL & cert renewals
  • Backups & DR
Deliverables:
  • Reference architecture
  • Terraform modules
  • Security notes
  • Cost plan

SRE & Monitoring

  • SLIs/SLOs
  • Error budgets
  • Dashboarding
  • Alert engineering
  • Incident drills
Deliverables:
  • SLO policy
  • Dashboards
  • Alert routes
  • Postmortem template

Cost Optimization

  • Right-sizing
  • Schedules
  • Autoscaling
  • Storage classes
  • Traffic policies
Deliverables:
  • Monthly cost report
  • Rightsize plan
  • Automation scripts

Consulting & DR

  • Architecture reviews
  • HA/DR plans
  • Migrations
  • Runbooks & KT
Deliverables:
  • Decision log
  • DR plan
  • Migration checklist
